First public beta of Timestamper.

### Added

- Live session timer with start/stop and elapsed time display.
- Timestamp marks via global shortcuts during a stream.
- Local history for completed streams with TXT, CSV, and JSON export.
- Configurable shortcuts with keyboard capture and validation.
- Optional OBS WebSocket 5.x integration to sync start/stop.
- Windows NSIS installer.

### Known limitations

- Windows 10 and 11 only.
- Unsigned installer: SmartScreen may show a warning.
- No Twitch API, cloud sync, or auto-update.

See [CHANGELOG.md](../../CHANGELOG.md) for the full details.
